_comment: Single source of truth for the Meshy asset pipeline. Each entry maps a game-data row (index.html AVATARS/ZTYPES/WEAPONS) to its Meshy prompt, task_id, and local file. The viewer, gen-meshy driver, and MANIFEST.md all read from here. `look` mirrors the in-game descriptor so viewer.html can render the 2D chibi overlay faithfully.

assets.label: Alex
assets.prompt: A chibi human warrior with warm tan skin, dark brown curly hair, wearing a golden-yellow jumpsuit, friendly rounded face, chibi cartoon style, big head small body, low-poly game asset, clean topology, flat saturated colors, bold simple shapes, smooth matte surfaces, T-pose, full body, white background

assets.label: Emily
assets.prompt: Funny cartoon chibi girl character, big oversized round head, tiny short body, huge sparkly expressive eyes, cheerful goofy grin, long flowing brown hair, bright pink hoodie, flat vibrant saturated colors, thick black cartoon outlines, mobile game mascot style, full body, standing T-pose, clean simple shapes
